title: Section 28
content: In the case of Government work, where Government is the first owner of the copyright therein, copyright shall subsist until 1[sixty years] from the beginning of the calendar year next following the year in which the work is first published.
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 13 of 1992, s. 2, for "fifty years" (w.e.f. 28-10-1991)
